name: hermes-agent
title: Hermes Agent
description: Chat with your local Hermes AI assistant
author: dailin4321

commands.name: clipboard
commands.title: Ask About Clipboard
commands.description: Ask Hermes about your clipboard content

commands.name: selected-text
commands.title: Process Selected Text
commands.description: Summarize, explain, translate, or improve selected text

commands.name: status
commands.title: API Server Status
commands.description: Check Hermes API server connection status

preferences.name: endpoint
preferences.title: API Endpoint
preferences.description: Hermes API server URL. Use http://127.0.0.1:8642 for local, or your remote URL for external access.

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Find in API_SERVER_KEY environment variable or ~/.hermes/config.yaml

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
